annotation_target.structure: Third phrase antecedent — continued meditation, subtle harmonic shift
teaching_goals: recognize the repetitive structure as intentional hypnosis
same touch as all previous phrases
style_tips: identical approach to mm. 3–6 and mm. 11–14

teaching_notes.note: Satie's repetition is not monotony — each phrase is a fresh thought.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 19–22 of Gymnopedie No. 1, view the piano roll, analyze the phrase, play in a loop, and predict the continuation.

session.content: Show me measures 19–22 of the Gymnopedie — does the third phrase differ from the earlier ones?
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 19–22.

Measures 19–22 bring a third phrase group — a subtle return and continuation of the Gymnopedie's meditation. The melody maintains its melancholy character while the harmonic underpinning shifts slightly. The antecedent ends with the same open quality. Let me loop mm. 19–22.
Satie Gymnopedie No. 1 mm. 19–22: third phrase antecedent, continued meditation, open ending.
